title: AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN SUMS APPROPRIATED IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4589 / 58 OG No. 15, 3098 (April 9, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3292, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN SUMS APPROPRIATED IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sums appropriated in Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen under:

1.Item (b), group IV, page 79, subparagraph (28) for the City of Manila, paragraph "f", Section two, for Social Welfare Administration Building, Central Street, Pandacan芒聙聰

Aid for construction P10,000.00

2. Item (p), group IV, page 80, subparagraph (28) for the City of Manila, paragraph "f", Section two, for Dart Extension芒聙聰 Asphalt paving from Oregon to Sison Street 7,000.00

3. Item 18, for the City of Manila, page 202 paragraph "g", Section two, for芒聙聰 Public Improvements, 4th District 5,000.00

4. Item 23 for the City of Manila, page 203, paragraph "g", Section two, for芒聙聰 Asphalting of Enriquez Street from Singalong Street to Dart Street, Malate P11,000.00

5. Item 29, for the City of Manila, page 203, paragraph "g", Section two, for芒聙聰 Asphalting of A. Flores Street from A.Mabini Street to Nebraska Street, Ermita 4,000.00

6. Project No. B-004.13 for the City of Manila, page 850-A, Title B-High-ways (Feeder and Secondary Roads), Appendix A, for芒聙聰 Estero de Sta. Clara, D el Pan Street: |GR|20.00|10.00|10.00|..|..|..|..|..|..|..|10.00| 3]....

7. Project No. B-004.41, for the City of Manila, page 854-A, Title B-High-ways (Feeder and Secondary Roads), Appendix A,for芒聙聰 Dart Street: From Oregon to Looban ...|GR|15.00|8.00|8.00|....|....|....|....|....|7.00|,...|....| Improvement totalling fifty-five thousand pesos, are hereby reappropriated, for the following1 purposes:

1. Intramuros Health Center, Sta. Potenciana, corner General Luna Street芒聙聰 Construction P20,000.00

2. All streets in Fabie Estate, Paco and Sta. Ana districts芒聙聰 Construction and asphalt paving 35,000.00

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
